title: tricalysia ambrensis subsp. ambrensis
intro: Tricalysia ambrensis subsp. ambrensis, also known as the Madagascar Tricalysia, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections. Tricalysia ambrensis subsp. ambrensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
